testimonials.title: Client Testimonials
testimonials.t2: Excellent work. The project was completed quickly and with great quality.
testimonials.t3: Very respectful, professional, and precise. I was satisfied with every stage of the project.
testimonials.t4: Working with him was a great experience. During the project he provided helpful consultation and practical solutions. He is responsive, knowledgeable, and experienced with multiple programming languages.
testimonials.t5: Very patient and detail‑oriented. They carefully implemented all of our feedback.
testimonials.t6: Our agency group based in Germany is proud to have worked with Milad on our website project. The modern implementation, PayPal integration, and international web services were handled perfectly, especially considering the multilingual nature of the project.
testimonials.t7: I am very satisfied with our collaboration. He is highly committed to his work and delivered the project right on schedule.
testimonials.t8:
We would like to express our sincere appreciation to the honorable Engineer Zandi.
He is an exceptionally meticulous and patient individual. Considering that we have worked with many programmers over the years, we have rarely encountered someone with the same level of patience and composure as him.
He performs his work with remarkable precision and elegance, and often implements features and improvements that were not even requested by the client, purely out of his own professional care and taste.

about.title: About Me
about.p1: I am a full‑stack developer passionate about building modern web and mobile applications.
about.p2: My focus is creating fast, scalable software with great user experiences.
